title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
